tool_purpose: This API provides a pre-trained image feature vector model for extracting features from images using TensorFlow Hub. The model is based on the ImageNet dataset and can be used for various image-related tasks such as classification, detection, and segmentation. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Feature extraction. API call: hub.KerasLayer('https://tfhub.dev/google/imagenet/feature_vector/1').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: This API provides a pre-trained image feature vector model for extracting features from images using TensorFlow Hub. The model is based on the ImageNet dataset and can be used for various image-related tasks such as classification, detection, and segmentation. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Feature extraction. API call: hub.KerasLayer('https://tfhub.dev/google/imagenet/feature_vector/1').
